title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four rules for effectively prompting Claude Code based on study of Anthropic engineers' practices: prompt skills not the model, structure skills as more than prompts, build composable reusable skills rather than custom ones, and iteratively improve skills across sessions. The approach emphasizes composability and skill architecture over ad-hoc prompting patterns.
